name: claudeflare-code
description: Claude Code CLI in per-user Cloudflare Containers, routed through AI Gateway

GATEWAY_ID.description: Your AI Gateway slug (from the AI Gateway dashboard, e.g. 'my-gateway').

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Your Cloudflare account ID (found in the dashboard sidebar).

AIG_PROXY_URL.description: The public URL of this worker. Set to https://claudeflare-code.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev after first deploy.

CF_ACCESS_AUD.description: Cloudflare Access application audience tag (from Zero Trust > Access > Applications).

CF_AIG_TOKEN.description: AI Gateway authentication token with 'Run' permission on your gateway.
